ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" INTEGER /* Type of the component (e.g., Microcontroller, Memory) */,
  "manufacturer" INTEGER /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type FOREIGN KEY ("component_type") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Data to SCK Setup) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Units of the parameter (e.g., ns, μs) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the parameter */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the parameter is critical for the component's operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES parameter_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., Microcontroller, Memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's official website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., ns, μs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the current version of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., design engineer, test engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter that depends on another parameter */,
  "dependent_param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., constraint, condition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dependency is required for the parameter to be valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_dependencies_dependent_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_dependencies_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)
